title: citrus × tachibana subf. depressa
intro: Citrus × tachibana subf. depressa, also known as Sudachi, is a small citrus species native to Japan. It is a hybrid of Citrus tachibana and possibly another citrus species, and is valued for its unique flavor and medicinal properties. Sudachi has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or oil, and is often used in Japanese herbal medicine to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
